steps.title: Identify the goal
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize orthoclase's Mohs scale number — so the sentence must center on orthoclase having a Mohs number of $6$ and what that means.

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content:
Choice B leads with orthoclase's number ($6$) and uses fluorite ($4$) and corundum ($9$) to contextualize what that number means. A omits orthoclase entirely; C lists three minerals abstractly without giving orthoclase's number; D centers on corundum, not orthoclase.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
